title: custom/Extend Microsoft 365 copilot
author: Mortal 1
text:
Title: Steps for customizing Microsoft Copilot for an app with multiple APIs connected to AWS I have an app running with more than 1 API and connected to AWS.
What are the steps I need to follow, and which one should I use: Graph Connector or Plugin? Can I use both of them simultaneously? Can I use Copilot in my custom website?
I'm looking for guidance on customizing Microsoft Copilot for my app, which is currently running with multiple APIs and connected to AWS.
I'm unsure about the steps I need to follow and which tool to use - the Graph Connector or the Plugin. Additionally,
I'd like to know if it's possible to use both of them simultaneously. Lastly, I'm interested in understanding if I can integrate Copilot into my custom website. Any insights or best practices on this topic would be greatly appreciated.
